channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Malik Nabers to miss Giants game at Seattle with concussion
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — The NFL's leading receiver Malik Nabers is out this week against Seattle, Giants coach Brian Daboll said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL says the preseason saw its fewest number of concussions since tracking started
item.description: The NFL saw its fewest number of concussions in the preseason since tracking started in 2015. There were 44 concussions in practices and games, a decrease of about 24% from last year.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A deadly hurricane is the latest disruption for young athletes who already have endured a pandemic
item.description: Pisgah High School in western North Carolina reopened its football stadium last year after Tropical Storm Fred tore through in 2021. Now it has to be rebuilt again after being demolished by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFLPA to announce new program limiting locker room interviews after some players were seen 'naked on camera'
item.description: Several awkward encounters have prompted the NFLPA to propose a new program that will move player interviews outside the locker room, Bengals center and player rep Ted Karras said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Twins senior VP and GM Thad Levine leaves team after 8 years
item.description: Minnesota senior vice president and general manager Thad Levine is leaving the Twins after eight seasons.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Denver Broncos to debut throwback field design when they face the Raiders
item.description: The Denver Broncos are debuting their 1977-inspired "Orange Crush" uniform for the first time, along with a new field design.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, ABC 4

item.title: Top-ranked Sinner 'very confident' despite WADA appealing his doping case
item.description: SHANGHAI (AP) — Top-ranked tennis player Jannik Sinner is “very confident” he will avoid a doping ban after the World Anti-Doping Agency appealed a decision to clear him of wrongdoing following two positive drug tests.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ninth-inning collapse makes Brewers' latest playoff exit particularly painful
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Willy Adames had just finished playing perhaps his final game with the Milwaukee Brewers when he described the most devastating of this franchise’s growing collection of playoff defeats.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fans set to camp out for Cal Bears big game
item.description: (KRON) – It will be a busy weekend for the City of Berkeley as the Cal Bears football team is hosting a college game day show for the first time in over 30 years. The Bears are currently (3-1) and are looking to knock off the eighth-seed and undefeated Miami Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Under MLB's new playoff format, a little rest isn't always the best
item.description: Shohei Ohtani has mashed 100 mph fastballs for homers, stolen bases against some of the game's best catchers and recently wrapped up one of the best regular seasons in Major League Baseball history.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here's where SoFi ranks among NFL's best (and worst) stadiums
item.description: SoFi Stadium in Inglewood is not the best stadium in the NFL but it did crack the top five, according to a survey released Thursday. Lumen Field, the home of the Seattle Seahawks, was named the best stadium for football fans to visit in USA Today's rankings of all NFL stadiums.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Buccaneers’ Vita Vea celebrates sack with sniper crawl amid NFL crackdown on 'violent' gestures
item.description: Amid the NFL's crackdown on "violent" gestures, Tampa Bay Buccaneers defensive tackle Vita Vea appeared celebrate a sack on Thursday night with a questionable gesture.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cincinnati Reds hire Terry Francona as manager a year after he left Cleveland, AP source says
item.description: Terry Francona needed some time away from baseball. A year was long enough. One of baseball's most beloved managers, Francona has been hired by the Cincinnati Reds, returning to a team he played for after stepping down in Cleveland following last season because of health reasons.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: On Football: It's early enough for NFL coaches on the hot seat to cool criticism with a few wins
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ Doug Pederson won a Super Bowl with a backup quarterback and turned a perennial loser into a playoff winner in his first season.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JJ Watt gives take on NFL's taunting penalty emphasis: 'Let these guys show their personalities'
item.description: NFL put an emphasis on taunting penalties, and they're reminded referees again to throw flags. J.J. Watt understands the fine line, but he also thinks trash talk is part of the game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Landmark ruling from top EU court says some FIFA rules on transfers are contrary to EU law
item.description: The European Union’s top court says some FIFA rules on player transfers are contrary to EU legislation relating to competition and freedom of movement.
item.dc:creator: Samuel Petrequin, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Pete Alonso sends New York Mets to NLDS with dramatic ninth-inning homer
item.description: Pete Alonso drilled a three-run home run in the ninth inning to propel the New York Mets over the Milwaukee Brewers in miraculous fashion on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FIFA to investigate Israel, days after Iran attacks, for alleged discrimination due to Palestinian complaints
item.description: FIFA intends to launch an investigation against the Israel Football Association over allegations raised by the Palestinian Football Association.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Padres' Fernando Tatis Jr. dances shirtless in locker room celebration after winning wild-card series
item.description: After the San Diego Padres clinched a spot in the National League Division Series Wednesday, star outfielder Fernando Tatis Jr. partied hard.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA first-rounder Nika Muhl stretchered off court after freak injury in overseas game
item.description: Nika Muhl, the Seattle Storm standout rookie, had a scary scene unfold in a title game in Turkey as she awkwardly turned her knee in a freak injury on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tom Brady to announce 49ers-Cardinals game Sunday
item.description: (KRON) -- Tom Brady will announce his first San Francisco 49ers game on Sunday, according to his page on Fox's website. The ex-player considered the Greatest Of All Time by many made the switch to the announcing booth this season.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: High School Boys Golf: Grand Junction shines in regionals, state tournaments set
item.description: This week, the 4A Region 4 tournament took place at Black Canyon Golf Course in Montrose. If we learned anything, it's that the Grand Junction Tigers are for real.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jazz new additions bring experience and leadership
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz did not land the "big game" Danny Ainge talked about in April, but they did sign a few key veteran role players this summer. Patty Mills is about to begin his 16th NBA season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sitake wants to keep BYU hungry during bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 34-28 win at Baylor, #17 BYU is 5-0 for the first time in three years. But head coach Kalani Sitake is going to make sure his team keeps its underdog mentality during the bye week. "That's our job," Sitake said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Pete Rose speaks with KTLA 5 in final interview
item.description: Pete Rose, Major League Baseball's all-time leader in hits and one of baseball's most divisive figures, died Monday at his home in Las Vegas. He was 83.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Baseball legend Pete Rose dies at 83
item.description: Pete Rose, Major League Baseball’s all-time hits leader who endured a lifetime ban for betting on the sport, has died at age 83, his agent Jeff Lenkov confirmed to KTLA 5 News. According to TMZ, Rose died at his home in Las Vegas on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Reports: Pete Rose, baseball's all-time hits leader, dead at 83
item.description: LAS VEGAS — Pete Rose, one of Major League Baseball's most polarizing athletes and the game's all-time hits leader, has died at the age of 83, according to TMZ. Rose's agent, Ryan Fiterman, confirmed the news to TMZ and said, "the family is asking for privacy at this time.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Xfinity playoffs begin as Aric Almirola dominates Kansas Speedway
item.description: Aric Almirola clinched his second win of the 2024 NASCAR Xfinity Series season at the Kansas Lottery 300, held at Kansas Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Petrulis, NewsNation

item.title: Basketball Hall of Famer Dikembe Mutombo dies at 58
item.description: Mutombo starred in the NBA for 18 seasons and is considered to be one of the greatest defensive players in the history of the sport.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WGN 9

item.title: Broncos def. Jets on the road 10-9
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Week 4 of the NFL season saw the Cincinnati Bengals claim their first victory of the year with a 34-24 win. Wide receiver Ja'Marr Chase showcased his speed and balance, sprinting 63 yards for a touchdown.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Americans get biggest road win and capture the Presidents Cup for the 10th straight time
item.description: MONTREAL (AP) — U.S. captain Jim Furyk raised the gold trophy before a team that dressed in red shirts that filled the scoreboard early with red scores. The Presidents Cup is one trophy the Americans own, for two decades and counting.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: More brain injuries will occur from contact sports: Doctor
item.description: Brett Favre's diagnosis with Parkinson's disease has brought discussions of the long-term effects of contact sports on brain function to the fore.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Chiefs' Harrison Butker jersey sales exceed Travis Kelce, Aaron Rodgers
item.description: In the offseason, Butker shot to national prominence after a speech on his Catholic beliefs at Benedictine College, a Catholic university in Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Bears vs. Rams: Injuries, inactives and keys to Sunday's game at Soldier Field
item.description: Los Angeles Rams (1-2) at Chicago Bears (1-2) Sunday, Noon, FOX UPDATE: The Bears just released their list of inactives on X. Inactive for Sunday's game are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Dominique Robinson, DB Terrell Smith, OL Bill Murray and DL Zacch Pickens.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
